issue.title: Remove dead WordPress adapter template renderer

artifacts.role: WordPress-profile adapter plans without the obsolete renderTemplate/templateError helper path
raw-block/template guard treating a missing template directory as an empty template set
policy manifest preserving zero raw-block and zero template counts

claims: The WordPress adapter profile no longer carries the unused template renderer helper path.
The adapter raw-block guard no longer depends on an untracked empty template directory in a zero-template checkout.
The zero raw-block and zero template-reference policy remains green.
non_claims: This does not forbid future compiler-owned adapter templates when admitted by Beads work, provenance, and parity gates.
This does not change generated public PHP behavior or broaden WordPress runtime ownership.
This does not claim WPHX PHP is a complete arbitrary-Haxe PHP backend.
